speaker: Susan
content: I hope you don't mind, I thought I'd come by early and help you set up.
mark: set up 筹备；建立，设立；安装

speaker: Eddie
content: Hey, Susan, don't worry, Mike and I have got everything under control.
mark: under control 处于控制之下；情况正常

speaker: Mike
content: Bongo! I don't know why he barks at you.
mark: bark v. 大声嚷，吼叫；n. 狗叫声，吠声； bark at 对……吠叫

speaker: Eddie
content: I wouldn't take it personally, dogs are very sensitive.
mark: I wouldn't take it personally 我不会为此而往心里去的。
sensitive adj. 过敏的，易受影响的；灵敏的；善解人意的，体恤的；敏感的

speaker: Eddie
content: What's up, Bongo? You never know what freaks them out, huh?
mark: freak n. 怪人，怪胎；怪异的事 v. <非正式>（使）吃惊，不安，恼怒 freak out 惊慌失措, 失去理智

speaker: Alice
content: In the distance, Susan thought she heard a bell ring.
mark: In the distance 在远处 distance n. 远处；疏远，隔阂；差距；进展；距离 v. 疏远，远离
bell n. 钟，铃；钟声，铃声

speaker: Eddie
content: Is it a strange noise? What is it? A weird smell?
mark: noise n. 噪音，嘈杂声；声音，响声；

speaker: Alice
mark: Round one 第一轮或第一阶段
